name: Gym Bro || Jordan Cubson
description:
"Hey dude, you need somethin'?"

You go to the locker rooms to wash off after a nice long workout at your local gym, but somebody seems to be there already.

Reupload because my stupid ass decided to accidentally upload him a week ago and now he's stuck at the end of the 4th page.

Extensively fixed and tested, but feedback still appreciated. Got a whole lorebook ass definition for this guy so maybe trying to work through that would be interesting besides all the bara sex. But we all know what you're here for.
creator: Rathakahsjshsjjsjsg
